detail.zhHant: Set out Potatoes, Mushrooms, Curry paste, Olive oil, Garlic, cut vegetables into even pieces, and measure the seasoning base before the pan gets hot.
detail.yue: Set out Potatoes, Mushrooms, Curry paste, Olive oil, Garlic, cut vegetables into even pieces, and measure the seasoning base before the pan gets hot.
detail.en: Set out Potatoes, Mushrooms, Curry paste, Olive oil, Garlic, cut vegetables into even pieces, and measure the seasoning base before the pan gets hot.

detail.zhHant: Warm oil in a wide pan, add onion and garlic, then cook Potatoes until lightly browned and nearly cooked through.
detail.yue: Warm oil in a wide pan, add onion and garlic, then cook Potatoes until lightly browned and nearly cooked through.
detail.en: Warm oil in a wide pan, add onion and garlic, then cook Potatoes until lightly browned and nearly cooked through.

detail.zhHant: Add the vegetables and staple, tossing in short bursts so the pan stays hot and the pieces pick up flavor without turning watery.
detail.yue: Add the vegetables and staple, tossing in short bursts so the pan stays hot and the pieces pick up flavor without turning watery.
detail.en: Add the vegetables and staple, tossing in short bursts so the pan stays hot and the pieces pick up flavor without turning watery.

detail.zhHant: Finish Potato Biryani-Style Rice with the sauce or garnish, rest for 2 minutes, and serve two balanced portions with the main ingredient visible on top.
